Who (either an actor or a musician) has received the highest number of awards?

Which are the 5 bands or musicians who have produced the highest number of albums?

Which are the top 3 taxonomic kingdoms that have the largest number of endangered species?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?kingdom (COUNT(DISTINCT ?species) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?species a dbo:Species ;
           dbo:conservationStatus ?status ;
           dbp:kingdom ?kingdom .
  FILTER(?status = dbr:Endangered)
}
GROUP BY ?kingdom
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 3

Is Blender released under the GNU license?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

ASK {
  { dbr:Blender_(software) dbo:license ?lic .
    FILTER(regex(str(?lic), "GNU", "i"))
  }
  UNION
  { dbr:Blender_(software) dbp:license ?lic2 .
    FILTER(regex(str(?lic2), "GNU", "i"))
  }
  UNION
  { dbr:Blender_(software) dbo:license ?L .
    ?L rdfs:label ?label .
    FILTER(langMatches(lang(?label),"en") && regex(?label, "GNU", "i"))
  }
  UNION
  { dbr:Blender_(software) dbp:license ?L2 .
    ?L2 rdfs:label ?label2 .
    FILTER(langMatches(lang(?label2),"en") && regex(?label2, "GNU", "i"))
  }
}

Who are the prime ministers of the United Kingdom?

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?primeMinister WHERE {
  ?primeMinister rdf:type dbo:PrimeMinister .
}

question: ¿Quiénes son los primeros ministros del Reino Unido?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  ?result a dbo:Person .
  {
    # direct link to the Prime Minister office resource (use dbp:office)
    ?result dbp:office dbr:Prime_Minister_of_the_United_Kingdom .
  }
  UNION
  {
    # office with a label containing "Prime Minister"
    ?result dbp:office ?office .
    ?office rdfs:label ?officeLabel .
    FILTER(langMatches(lang(?officeLabel),"EN"))
    FILTER(regex(?officeLabel, "Prime Minister", "i"))
  }
  UNION
  {
    # property in dbp that mentions Prime Minister in its string value
    ?result dbp:office ?officeStr .
    FILTER(regex(str(?officeStr), "Prime Minister", "i"))
  }
}

question: Stephen Merchant is the executive producer of the series having how many fictional characters?

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?char) AS ?count) WHERE {

  ?char a dbo:FictionalCharacter .

}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?character) AS ?count) WHERE {
  # Series for which Stephen Merchant is an executive producer
  ?series dbo:executiveProducer dbr:Stephen_Merchant .
  # fictional characters of that series (typed)
  ?series dbo:fictionalCharacter ?character .
  ?character a dbo:FictionalCharacter .
}

Which alliance has the most member airlines?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
SELECT ?uri
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbp:alliance ?uri .
}
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

question: Name some television shows related to the one whose opening theme was composed by Bear McCreary.
Nombra algunos programas de televisión relacionados con aquel cuya música de apertura fue compuesta por Bear McCreary.
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  # aceptar tanto la propiedad como el literal que contenga el nombre
  ?show ?composerProp ?composer .
  VALUES ?composerProp { dbo:composer dbo:themeMusicComposer dbp:themeMusicComposer dbp:composer dbo:associatedMusicalArtist }
  FILTER( ?composer = dbr:Bear_McCreary || STR(?composer) = "Bear McCreary" )

  # buscar programas relacionados al show cuya música de apertura compuso Bear McCreary
  ?show (dbo:wikiPageWikiLink|dbo:relatedWork) ?result .
  ?result rdf:type dbo:TelevisionSeries .
}

  dbr:University_of_Oxford (dbo:country|dbp:country|dbo:locationCountry) ?country .
  ?country rdf:type dbo:Country .
  ?country (dbo:areaLand|dbo:areaTotal|dbp:area_km2|dbp:area) ?result .
}

question: List all the software that works on Linux and MacOS operating systems.
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  ?result a dbo:Software .
  ?result dbo:operatingSystem dbr:Linux .
  ?result dbo:operatingSystem dbr:Mac_OS_X .
}

question: ¿Qué programas informáticos funcionan tanto en Linux como en MacOS?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  ?result rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (dbo:Software, dbo:ComputerProgram))
  
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?result ?p1 ?os1 .
    FILTER(?p1 IN (dbo:operatingSystem, dbo:platform, dbp:operatingSystem, dbp:platform, dbp:operating_system))
    FILTER(
      ?os1 = dbr:Linux ||
      CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?os1)), "linux")
    )
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?result ?p2 ?os2 .
    FILTER(?p2 IN (dbo:operatingSystem, dbo:platform, dbp:operatingSystem, dbp:platform, dbp:operating_system))
    FILTER(
      ?os2 = dbr:MacOS ||
      ?os2 = dbr:Mac_OS_X ||
      CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?os2)), "mac") ||
      CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?os2)), "os x") ||
      CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?os2)), "macos")
    )
  }
}
ORDER BY ?result

question: What other honors have recipients of the Presidential Medal of Freedom received?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  {
    ?person dbo:award dbr:Presidential_Medal_of_Freedom .
    # other awards recorded as resources for persons with the medal
    ?person dbo:award ?result .
    FILTER(?result != dbr:Presidential_Medal_of_Freedom)
  }
  UNION
  {
    # persons recorded as having the medal in dbp:awards (literal)
    ?person dbp:awards ?medraw .
    FILTER(regex(str(?medraw), "Presidential Medal of Freedom", "i"))
    # try to get other awards modelled as dbo:award for these persons
    ?person dbo:award ?result .
    FILTER(?result != dbr:Presidential_Medal_of_Freedom)
  }
}

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {
  dbr:Tokyo dbp:populationTotal ?popTokyo .
  dbr:Delhi dbp:populationTotal ?popDelhi .

}
